task_completion.description: The agent logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the Removable Storage (USB) Auditing configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus interface displays the configuration page specifically for Removable Storage or USB Auditing.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the 'Workstations' Organizational Unit (OU) for the audit configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workstations' OU is visibly selected, checked, or added in the target domain/OU selection area of the configuration page.

task_completion.description: The agent enabled monitoring for USB connection, disconnection, and file copy events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes or toggles for 'Removable Device Plug-in' (or connected/disconnected) and 'Files Copied to Removable Storage' (or File Read/Write/Delete) are selected in the ADAudit Plus configuration interface.

task_completion.description: The agent saved a screenshot of the configuration to 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_result.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, image viewer, or terminal command shows the file 'usb_audit_config_result.png' existing in the 'C:\workspace\' directory.

task_completion.description: The agent created a summary text file at 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_summary.txt' with the text 'USB Audit Enabled'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) or terminal output shows the file 'usb_audit_config_summary.txt' in 'C:\workspace\' containing exactly the text 'USB Audit Enabled'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine ADAudit Plus application being clicked and navigated, not a mock-up or a script output.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the configuration page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot file 'usb_audit_config_result.png' displays the actual ADAudit Plus UI with the correct settings applied by the agent, rather than a generic image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers or configuration states into a text file to bypass the actual application configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps must be visible within the ADAudit Plus web interface, not just written out in Notepad or a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot path is 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_result.png'. The expected summary text file path is 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_summary.txt'. In the ADAudit Plus UI, the required events ('USB Storage Device Connected', 'USB Storage Device Disconnected', and 'File Copied to USB') correspond to settings like 'Removable Device Plug-in' and 'Files Copied to Removable Storage' (or similar 'File Read/Write/Delete' settings).
